permissible_bases.description: Dispute relates to terms, conditions, or authorized use
Dispute relates to consumer's performance or payment history
Dispute relates to identity — account belongs to different consumer

dismissible_without_investigation: Substantially same as prior dispute (16 CFR 660.4(f))
Dispute does not relate to accuracy of reported information
Consumer fails to provide sufficient information to investigate

consumer_remedy.if_not_investigated: FCRA §616 — civil liability for willful noncompliance
consumer_remedy.if_not_corrected: FCRA §617 — civil liability for negligent noncompliance
consumer_remedy.damages: actual damages + attorneys fees + statutory $100-$1000 per violation
